response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with 15+ years of experience, solid Linux/open-source background, and relevant skills in architecture, Python-adjacent stacks, and team-related activities (workshops, mentoring via talks). However, the role explicitly requires German at C1 minimum and the candidate self-reports only Basic German — a hard blocker for a client-facing leadership role in a German-speaking market. Formal leadership/Head-of-Development experience is also limited; most roles are individual contributor (Senior/Staff Developer) rather than team lead with direct reports.
strengths: Deep open-source and Linux/Unix background with 15+ years across web, embedded, and distributed systems
Strong architecture and craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, founder of GISCollective, multiple OSS libraries)
Proven ability to mentor and communicate technically via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: German listed as only Basic — fails the C1 hard requirement for client advisory work
No explicit Head-of-Development or formal people-management experience leading interdisciplinary teams
Python and UML not evidenced in resume; primary stacks are TypeScript/Node and DLang
